description.ko: 차가운 금속과 빗속 네온사인의 따뜻하고 활기찬 빛의 대비를 강조한 미래지향적 메가시티의 로맨틱한 비전입니다.
description.en: A romanticized vision of a futuristic megacity, emphasizing the contrast between cold metal and the warm, vibrant glow of neon lights in the rain.

prompt: A cinematic vertical low-angle shot of a rainy cyberpunk alleyway in NEON-V. Towering #1A0033 skyscrapers are draped in massive 3D holograms pulsing in #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan. Heavy artificial rain creates vibrant, distorted reflections on the wet asphalt. Flying maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through thick volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced reflections, 8k resolution, capturing a moody and romantic futuristic urban atmosphere.
